description: Canonical post-provenance RPL DAO route-state transitions from fixed RFC 6550 option bytes and LICHEN Section 8.8 semantics (v2 schema).

oracle.scope: Route-state processing after DAO provenance, authorization, and origin replay acceptance
oracle.sequence_policy: RFC 6550 Section 7.2 rule 2 direct increments 127->0 and 255->0 are newer; all other comparisons use rule 3 with SEQUENCE_WINDOW=16
